data.name: LoveXLust
data.detailed_description:
Whether you crave a tender romantic evening or a daring late-night adventure, LoveXLust empowers you with intuitive controls, deep customization, and endless possibilities to fulfill whatever scenario you can imagine.

Limitless Customization

  • Sculpt Your Perfect Partner: Adjust body shapes, facial features, outfits, and accesories to create a truly unique character.

  • Dynamic Expressions & Reactions: Your creations respond in real time to your actions, responding to your desires with heightened sensations.

Interactive Scenes & Environments

  • Varied Locations: From cozy hideaways to lavish getaways, each environment offers a distinct mood and set of interactive elements.

  • Flexible Poses & Positions: Experiment with a wide library of intimate positions that fit every fantasy—from the gentle and romantic to the wildly adventurous.

Flexible Controls & Gameplay

  • Streamlined Controls: Penetrate and control everything with mouse/keyboard or setup AutoMode for a leisurely experience.

Cinematic & Elusive

  • Video Camera - Cinematic Mode: Have you got what you set in your mind, sit back, relax, and enjoy what you’ve set in a interactive movie scene.

  • Photo Mode: Aim for the perfect shot with your perfect partner. Love what you see? Take a snapshot of your favorite position.

Creative Adult Toys & Props

  • Extensive Toy Library: Experiment with vibrators, role-play items, and other fun accessories to spice up your sessions.

  • Combine & Customize: Mix different props in imaginative ways—add personal flair to every encounter.

Expand & Evolve

  • Ongoing Updates: Expect periodic new scenes, accessories, and characters to keep your experience fresh.

  • Community Feedback: Join our Steam forums or Discord to share suggestions and help shape future features.

Welcome to the Sin Club

You’ve just stepped into Sin Club, a discreet gentlemen’s lounge renowned for its electric ambiance and glamorous clientele. As the newest member, your nights are about to be filled with whispered invitations, heated glances, and a world of indulgence far beyond the ordinary. Slide into a velvet booth and strike up conversations with enigmatic companions, each offering their own temptations and hidden stories.

Across the club’s corridors, you’ll discover themed rooms catering to every mood—whether it’s a playful burlesque stage where coy smiles lead to sultry laughter, or a private hideaway where soft music and champagne set the tone for deeper connections. From the hush of the VIP lounge to the neon-lit dance floor that pulses with energy, every corner reveals a new spark of excitement, romance, or passionate curiosity.

Are you ready to embrace the spotlight and forge irresistible bonds with the club’s alluring denizens? Or will you let the night’s magic guide you into spontaneous encounters that keep you coming back for more? The choice is yours—your membership grants you entrée to a world where fantasies flirt with reality, and the only limit is how far you dare to let your desires lead you.

Ready to Begin? Your journey of erotic discovery awaits. Create & Control Your Fantasies in LoveXLust and unlock a realm of pleasure, passion, and limitless personalization.

data.short_description: A world where your every desire can be shaped, molded, and brought to life. LoveXLust invites you to Create & Control Your Fantasies, giving you the power to design your dreams, explore seductive environments, and indulge in fully interactive intimate encounters—all at your own pace.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: i7 7000 series
  • 記憶體: 8000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1080
  • 儲存空間: 13 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: OpenXR Meta Quest 2, OpenXR Meta Quest 3
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: i7 10700 series
  • 記憶體: 16000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 2070
  • 儲存空間: 13 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: OpenXR Meta Quest 2, OpenXR Meta Quest 3

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: i7 7000 series
  • Memory: 8000 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1080
  • Storage: 13 GB available space
  • VR Support: OpenXR Meta Quest 2, OpenXR Meta Quest 3
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: i7 10700 series
  • Memory: 16000 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 2070
  • Storage: 13 GB available space
  • VR Support: OpenXR Meta Quest 2, OpenXR Meta Quest 3
